---
name: Entry request
about: Suggest a new tool, library, or resource to add to the list
title: "[Entry request] "
labels: entry-request
assignees: ''
---

## Project details

**Project name:**
<!-- e.g., Mem0 -->

**URL:**
<!-- e.g., https://github.com/mem0ai/mem0 -->

**License:**
<!-- e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0 -->

**Last commit date:**
<!-- e.g., 2025-03-15 — must be within the last 12 months -->

## Categorization

**Category:**
<!-- Choose one: perception, memory, planning, execution, communication, orchestration, sandbox, pipeline -->

**Tags:**
<!-- e.g., `memory` `python` `langchain` — use tags from the taxonomy in CONTRIBUTING.md -->

**Section it belongs in:**
<!-- e.g., Skills → Memory, or Workflows → Research, or Environments → Sandboxes -->

## Description

**Why it belongs in this list:**
<!-- Explain what this tool enables an agent to do that it couldn't do before, or do better. 1-2 sentences. -->

**Suggested entry text:**
<!-- Write the entry in the exact template format:
**[Name](url)** — One sentence description. Tags: `tag1` `tag2`
-->

## Confirmation

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The URL is working (I tested it today)
- [ ] The project has an OSS license
- [ ] The project has been updated within the last 12 months
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing entry
